task: Φ* v3 canonical (auto-conditioning HID=8) substrate-architecture cross-comparison: 4-bb transformer baseline vs Mamba-2.8b state-space recurrent
metric_design: AUTO-CONDITIONING canonical: HID_TRUNC = max(2, N//2) = 8 (N=16), eff_dof_full=8, eff_dof_half=0+ridge stabilized

H6A_transformer_specific_anti_integratio.reasoning: mistral/gemma stable-large-NEG (-16.7 / -0.79) NOT reproduced in Mamba (+0.33). Anti-integration large-magnitude signal appears transformer-architecture-specific, not LLM-substrate-universal.

H6B_LLM_substrate_inherent_anti_integrat.reasoning: Mamba phi_star_min = +0.3258 (POSITIVE), not negative. If anti-integration were LLM-substrate-inherent (independent of architecture), Mamba should also show NEG. It does not.

H6C_border_measurement_noise_dominant.reasoning: Mamba +0.33 falls in same border POS region as qwen3 (+1.04). Per #167, this region is sign-flipping under hyperparameter variation. Single-condition Mamba result is in noise-band, NOT large-magnitude stable signal. Cannot distinguish from noise without sweep.

primary_finding: Mamba state-space recurrent does NOT exhibit the large-magnitude stable anti-integration signal seen in mistral (-16.7) and gemma (-0.79). Mamba sits in the border POS region (qwen3-llama family). H6B substrate-inherent claim FALSIFIED.

triad_b_cross_substrate_corroboration_pr.non_transformer_addition: Mamba +0.33 border POS — joins qwen3/llama family, NOT mistral/gemma stable-NEG family
triad_b_cross_substrate_corroboration_pr.interpretation: Anti-integration evidence is transformer-architecture-narrowed (mistral+gemma 2/4 transformer backbones only). State-space recurrent (Mamba) does NOT corroborate. Cross-substrate corroboration for triad (b) NOT achieved — instead, the substrate-inherent universality hypothesis is REJECTED for Mamba.
triad_b_cross_substrate_corroboration_pr.implication_for_omega_cycle_alm_free_pat: ALM-free path justification (#148/#152 + narrowed by #164) further narrowed. Anti-integration substrate signal: transformer-specific (mistral+gemma family within transformer), NOT LLM-class universal.

cost_summary.cap_overrun_explanation: first 3 pods consumed budget on infra debugging (mamba-ssm build fail / tokenizer absence / weights-vs-arch shape mismatch). all 4 pods auto-terminated. cap exceeded but per pod cap-driven kill was honored — total session budget enforcement should aggregate across retries in next iteration.

raw_10_honest: Single Mamba backbone (mamba-2.8b-hf 2.8B params) at single hyperparameter cell (K=8 seed=42 ridge=1e-3 HID=8). Mamba phi_star_min = +0.3258 falls in qwen3-class border-POS noise band — per #167 minisweep, this region is sign-flipping under (K, seed, ridge) variation. Without analogous Mamba minisweep (4 × 36 cells = ~$0.30 additional), cannot rule out hyperparameter-fragile interpretation. Conservative claim: Mamba does NOT reproduce the large-magnitude stable anti-integration signal of mistral/gemma — that suffices to FALSIFY H6B substrate-inherent. Strong claim (Mamba shows positive integration) NOT supported until fragility check. RWKV not tested this cycle (option C deferred). Mamba slow-path forward (mamba-ssm install failed) may have different numerical behavior than fast-path; checkpoint shapes loaded correctly via mamba-2.8b-hf canonical variant. h_dim=2560 (smaller than mistral 4096); top-variance-8 truncation includes top-8 dims only — variance band [27, 79] vs mistral [189, 842] — Mamba's hidden activations are compressed (smaller absolute scale).
